hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; sys.stdout.write(json.load(sys.stdin)['tool_input']['file_path'])" | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q '\.sql$'; then model=$(basename "$f" .sql); cd /d/vietnam-air-quality-pipeline && .venv/Scripts/dbt test --select "$model"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Running dbt test on SQL model...

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; sys.stdout.write(json.load(sys.stdin)['tool_input']['file_path'])" | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q '\.tf$'; then cd /d/vietnam-air-quality-pipeline/terraform && terraform validate; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

bash -c 'source /d/vietnam-air-quality-pipeline/.env 2>/dev/null && export PATH="/c/Program Files/Amazon/AWSCLIV2:$PATH" && if [ -n "$S3_BUCKET_NAME" ]; then count=$(aws s3 ls s3://$S3_BUCKET_NAME/raw/batch/ --recursive 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"S3 raw/batch/ file count: $count\"}"; fi'
